placeName: MixTree Languages - English Courses in Amsterdam

reviews.author: Nur E
reviews.text:
Ashley, you are an amazing teacher!
I started learning English in a group course, and Ashley was my first private teacher. I had excellent communication with her and always attended lessons enthusiastically. Later, we continued with private lessons, and I improved my English during this time. Feeling the care and dedication she puts into her lessons was very motivating. Talking with her in English, sharing my daily life and plans, felt almost like therapy; I left each lesson happy and inspired. I can now express myself better. The immigration process is already challenging, and working with a kind and supportive teacher like Ashley was truly valuable. I hope everything goes as she wishes she is an amazing teacher.

reviews.author: Ott Boes
reviews.text: Fantastic place to improve your language! Nice people very good teachers. They do everything to teach you all the varieties of the English language so classes are never boring! Its dynamic and interesting because of all the nationalities you meet here. I fully recommend

reviews.author: angelika czubasiewicz
reviews.text: Taking English classes at Mixtree School was such a great experience. The people there are amazing and the teachers are really supportive and friendly. I highly recommend this school to anyone looking to improve their English. And honestly, they also have really good coffee!

reviews.author: Vita Kolpinova
reviews.text:
I've finished my C1 Morning Course (Dublin) in MixTree and I'm completely happy with the whole experience! We practiced a lot of speaking in every class, and it made me very talkative :)
I love the communicative approach of teaching with flipped classroom — you're always working with your classmates and learning new grammar or vocabulary together! My teachers, Magui and Kathleen, are amazing people.
I've also decided to continue with the next part of this course in October!

reviews.author: Irem Onar
reviews.text: Beyond teachers excellent command of English, mentorship and flexibility have made a remarkable progress on my English journey. I recommend 1-1 online classes for the ones looking for confidence and progress.
